NEW POSTER: ANCIENT GIANTS! Big heads, bigger secrets. These ancient faces know something.

Stay sharp, Villains!

title: Infinite Flight Simulator
notes:
This update includes the A330-800neo, new ground services, flight planning improvements, and more!

NEW
• A330-800neo with 5 liveries
• 5 new 737 and A320 liveries
• 47 new 3D airports
• In-app What's New feed highlighting new features, with full release notes
• Flight plan undo for waypoint edits, altitude changes, procedures, and clearing plans
• Ground Services: Fuel Truck with multiplayer and replay support
• Expanded passenger access controls with separate jetbridge and stairs options
